title: CHILDREN'S ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: LIBERTY HOUSE CHILDREN'S ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assessments, support services, medical evaluations and forensic evaluations for suspected child abuse victims. Also provides on-site therapy as well as off-site therapy and counseling referrals, safety planning, advocacy services, and community trainings and prevention education. 2685 4th Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 who are suspected victims of all types of abuse Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 540-0288 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 540-0288 Main phone Main phone (503) 540-0288 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located just off the Salem Parkway in north Salem Services: Child Abuse Counseling Child Abuse Medical Evaluations Child Abuse Prevention Child Advocacy Centers Therapy Referrals * Child Abuse Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - HOPE & WELLNESS SERVICES PUBLIC SAFETY - IRESPECT&PROTECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIBERTY HOUSE
